title: Privacy Policy
intro: This policy describes what data WishList App collects and how we use it.
dataItems: Your name and email from your Google account - only when signing in via Google
The contents of your wishlists and added items
Anonymous usage statistics via Google Analytics
useText: Your data is used solely to operate the service: to identify your account and store your wishlists. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
storageText: Data is stored in Firebase (Google Cloud, European servers). Google Analytics only collects anonymised visit data.
rightsText: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time - email us at rost.redko@gmail.com. Wishlists you have shared become inaccessible after deletion.
contactText: For privacy enquiries, email us at
